name: OpenClaw
description: Open-source reimplementation of the 1997 game Captain Claw

download.build_instructions: git clone https://github.com/pjasicek/OpenClaw.git && cd OpenClaw && mkdir build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && make

notes: NO macOS binary exists in releases. Latest release (v0.3) has Windows .zip only. Previous release (v0.0) had .deb/.rpm for Linux + Windows .zip. README lists macOS as supported but provides no build instructions. No Homebrew formula. Must build from source with SDL2 deps.
